name: Ubiquiti airFiber 60 Long-Range
title: Ubiquiti airFiber 60 Long-Range
title_extended: Ubiquiti airFiber 60 Long-Range - 60 GHz, Throughput 1.8 Gbps, Integrated GPS, Long Range Up to 12 km
short_description: airFiber 60 GHz, Throughput 1.8 Gbps, Integrated GPS, Long Range Up to 12 km
description: The AirFiber 60 LR is a long-range, high-performance wireless bridge developed by Ubiquiti Networks. This device is a significant addition to Ubiquiti's AirFiber series, designed to deliver gigabit-level throughput over the 60 GHz frequency band. The "LR" in its name stands for "Long Range," indicating its capability to maintain high-speed, point-to-point (PtP) connectivity across extended distances, making it an ideal solution for connecting remote locations or spanning large campuses without the need for physical cabling.

detailed_description.heading: Long-Range Wireless Bridge
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 60 LR is a long-range, high-performance wireless bridge developed by Ubiquiti Networks. This device is a significant addition to Ubiquiti's AirFiber series, designed to deliver gigabit-level throughput over the 60 GHz frequency band. The "LR" in its name stands for "Long Range," indicating its capability to maintain high-speed, point-to-point (PtP) connectivity across extended distances, making it an ideal solution for connecting remote locations or spanning large campuses without the need for physical cabling.

detailed_description.heading: Performance and Technology
detailed_description.text: Equipped with the latest in wireless technology, the AF60-LR is capable of achieving up to 1+ Gbps of real throughput, ensuring fast and efficient data transmission that can support a wide range of applications, from video surveillance systems to data backhaul for internet service providers. The device utilizes the unlicensed 60 GHz spectrum, taking advantage of its low-interference characteristics to deliver clean and stable connections even in areas with dense wireless signals. One of the key features of the AF60-LR is its integrated high-gain antenna. This precision antenna enables the device to establish long-distance wireless links, significantly exceeding the range of standard Wi-Fi or 60 GHz solutions. Additionally, the AF60-LR employs Ubiquiti's proprietary airFiber technology, which optimizes performance and enhances signal integrity across the PtP link.

detailed_description.heading: Easy Installation and Management
detailed_description.text: Ubiquiti Networks has designed the AF60-LR with simplicity in mind. The device includes a user-friendly mounting kit for quick installation on poles, towers, or building exteriors. Alignment is made easy through visual and software-based tools, enabling precise positioning for optimal performance. For network management, the AF60-LR integrates seamlessly with Ubiquiti's network management software(UISP app), allowing operators to monitor and configure the device remotely, further simplifying the operational workload. The AirFiber 60 LR boasts a rugged, weather-resistant design, allowing it to withstand the challenges of outdoor deployment. Its durable construction ensures operation in diverse environmental conditions, from scorching heat to freezing temperatures, providing reliable service year-round. The device's compact form factor and integrated antenna simplify installation and alignment, reducing setup time and labor costs.

detailed_description.heading: Security and Compliance
detailed_description.text: Security is a paramount concern for Ubiquiti, and the AirFiber 60 LR incorporates advanced encryption and secure management protocols to protect the network and its data. Compliance with local regulations in the 60 GHz band is also addressed, allowing for peace of mind in deployment and operation.
